response.overview: In 1967, Jacques Lin began to live with autistic children in the living areas that Fernand Deligny was setting up in the Cévennes. The children have now reached adulthood. Jacques films daily life in the network along with the customary activities.  All the images filmed by Jacques Lin are in a film with no pedagogical or historical aim. Aucun d’eux ne dit mot is a choreography of gestures and bodies accompanied by modulated sounds that embellish daily life with these companions.
response.title: Aucun d’Eux Ne Dit Mot
